description: §6.13.5 E-DEBOUNCED-WITH-SERVER — `debounced=`/`throttled=` on a `<x server>` server-authoritative cell is forbidden: server writes go through the §52 server-write path, not the client-side timing wrapper. `<x server debounced=300ms> = ""` fires E-DEBOUNCED-WITH-SERVER. Asserted AS an error. Incidental server-auth codes (E-AUTH-005/W-AUTH-001) + E-DG-002/W-PROGRAM-001 ignored by superset.
rationale: §6.13.6: `debounced=`/`throttled=` on a `<x server>` server-authoritative cell SHALL fire E-DEBOUNCED-WITH-SERVER — the client-side timing wrapper and the §52 server-write path don't compose.
